text:
Bloody Sunday in Londonderry (now officially Derry) took place in the year **1972**.

The event occurred on Sunday, January 30, 1972, when British soldiers shot unarmed civil rights marchers in the Bogside area of Londonderry. Thirteen people were killed immediately or died from their injuries shortly after, and another person died months later, bringing the total fatalities to fourteen.

FINAL ANSWER: 1972
